GitHub Actions workflows for building, testing, compliance checks, translation management, and stale PR handling.


## Files
- **[build-bootloader.yml](build-bootloader.yml.md)**: GitHub Actions workflow for building and storing bootloader images on push or pull request to the main branch.
- **[build-firmware.yml](build-firmware.yml.md)**: GitHub Actions workflow for building and storing firmware artifacts for multiple board configurations.
- **[build-prf.yml](build-prf.yml.md)**: GitHub Actions workflow for building and bundling PRF files on push and pull requests to the main branch.
- **[build-qemu.yml](build-qemu.yml.md)**: GitHub Actions workflow for building Pebble firmware using QEMU on specified branches and paths.
- **[build-translation-source.yml](build-translation-source.yml.md)**: A GitHub Actions workflow to build and upload translation sources for the Pebble firmware.
- **[compliance.yml](compliance.yml.md)**: GitHub Actions workflow for running GitLint on pull requests to check commit message compliance.
- **[crowdin-pull.yml](crowdin-pull.yml.md)**: Automates weekly and manual pulling of translations from Crowdin using GitHub Actions.
- **[stale-pr.yml](stale-pr.yml.md)**: Automates closing of stale pull requests using GitHub Actions with a 30-day inactivity threshold.
- **[test.yml](test.yml.md)**: GitHub Actions workflow for testing the Pebble firmware on push and pull requests to the main branch.
